# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31
Description: Complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer)

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.InternetGatewayId

  NATGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NatGateway'
    Properties:
      AllocatePublicIp: 'true'
      SubnetId: !GetAtt NatSubnet.SubnetId

  RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTableGatewayAssociation'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref MyNATInstanceRouteTable
      VpcPeeringConnectionId: !Ref MyVPCpeeringConnection

  NatSubnet:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs ]
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: 'true'

  NatInternetGatewayRoute:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref NATGateway
      RouteTableId: !Ref MyNATInstanceRouteTable

  MyNATInstance:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Instance'
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-abc123def4567890   # Replace with the AMI ID for your region.
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: MyKeyPair               # Replace with your key pair name.
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref MyNATInstanceSecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !GetAtt NatSubnet.SubnetId
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          service iptables stop
          service ip6tables stop

  MyNATInstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupName: MyNATInstanceSG
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC

  MySubnetGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::Service::ECS::ClusterSubnetsConfiguration'
    Properties:
      ClusterName: !Ref MyECSCluster
      Subnets:
        - SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet1
          Name: MySubnet1
        - SubnetId: !Ref MySubnet2
          Name: MySubnet2

  MyVPCpeeringConnection:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCPeeringConnection'
    Properties:
      VpcIds:
        - !Ref MyVPC
        - !Ref RemoteVPC
      AutoAccept: true

  MyRDSInstance:
    Type: 'AWS::RDS::DBInstance'
    Properties:
      AllocatedStorage: 20   # Adjust as per your storage requirements.
      DBInstanceClass: db.t2.micro   # Replace with the desired RDS instance type.
      Engine: mysql          # Replace with your preferred RDS engine if required.
      MasterUsername: MyUsername
      MasterUserPassword: MyPassword
      DatabaseName: MyDatabase
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref MyRDSInstanceSecurityGroup

  MyRDSInstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup'
    Properties:
      GroupName: MyRDSInstanceSG
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC

  MyECSCluster:
    Type: 'AWS::Service::ECS::Cluster'
      Properties:
        ClusterName: MyApplicationCluster

  MyLoadBalancer:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancing::LoadBalancer'
    Properties:
      Type: application
      Scheme: internet-facing
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref MyECSClusterSecurityGroup
      Subnets:
        - Ref: MySubnet1
        - Ref: MySubnet2

  MyASG:
    Type: 'AWS::Service::ECS::TaskDefinition'
    Properties:
      Family: MyApplicationTaskDefinition
      NetworkMode: awsvpc   # For EC2 tasks on a VPC.
      RequiresCompatibilities:
        - FARGATE
      ContainerDefinitions:
        - Name: MyContainer
          Image: myregistry/myimage:latest   # Replace with your Docker image details.
          Essential: true
          PortMappings:
            - ContainerPort: 80
              HostPort: '0'
              Protocol: tcp

  MyApplicationService:
    Type: 'AWS::Service::ECS::Service'
    Properties:
      Cluster: !Ref MyECSCluster
      DeploymentCircleHooks:
        - Name: AllowRollingUpdate
          Resource: !Sub arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/${StackName}/MyASG/!Ref MyASG
          Order: 10
      DesiredCount: 3   # Adjust as per your application requirements.
      LaunchConfigurationTemplate:
        LaunchConfigurationName: !Sub ${ServiceName}LC
        ImageId: ami-abc123def4567890   # Replace with the AMI ID for your region.
        InstanceType: t2.micro
      LoadBalancers:
        - ContainerName: MyContainer
          ContainerPort: 80
          TargetGroupArn: !Ref MyTargetGroup
      NetworkConfiguration:
        Subnets:
          - Ref: MySubnet1
          - Ref: MySubnet2
        SecurityGroups:
          - Ref: MyECSClusterSecurityGroup
      PropagateTags: 'SERVICE'
      RollingUpdateConfiguration:
        MaxBatchSize: 3   # Adjust as per your application requirements.
        MinHealthyPercentage: 50   # Adjust as per your application requirements.
        PauseTimeBetweenInstances: 60
      ServiceName: MyApplicationService
      Tag:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyApplicationService

  MyTargetGroup:
    Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup'
    Properties:
      HealthCheckPath: /health
      Port: '80'
      Protocol: HTTP
      TargetType: ip
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Name: MyTargetGroup
